title: MwbeStatistic
description: A Minority- and Women-Owned Business Enterprise (M/WBE) participation statistic for the NYC Law Department — the share of the Department's contracting activity, by M/WBE category, across contract families. Canonical schema reconciling 'Minority and Women-Owned Business Enterprise Statistics' (svyi-maaj). Percentage values are stored as reported (strings like '9.23%').

mwbeType.description: M/WBE category ('MWBE Type', e.g. Black American, Hispanic American, Asian American, Women).

primeContractsStandardServices.description: Prime contracts — standard services ('Prime Contracts - Standard Services').

primeContractsProfessionalServices.description: Prime contracts — professional services ('Prime Contracts - Professional Services').
